keyEvents.text: Jimmy Benice (French Guiana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
First Half ends, French Guiana 0, Belize 0.
Second Half begins French Guiana 0, Belize 0.
Substitution, French Guiana. Inrick Baal replaces Stryker Youssou.

Goal!  French Guiana 0, Belize 1. Jordy Polanco (Belize) header from the left side of the six yard box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Angelo Capello   following a set piece situation.
Substitution, French Guiana. Warren Rino replaces Verlyno Abionie.

Substitution, French Guiana. Jules Haabo replaces Loïc Baal.
